metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when DSO is below industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Maintain customer relationships, optimize credit terms strategically, prevent over-tightening from harming revenue

universal_controls.title: Credit Policy Relaxation Review
universal_controls.description: Analyze if collection speed is causing customer customer turnover (churn) or lost bids. Pilot extended terms (net-45/60) for top 20% strategic accounts and track retention vs margin impact.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Credit term pilot log + retention/churn report

universal_controls.title: Customer Experience & Billing Friction Audit
universal_controls.description: Survey key accounts on billing clarity, portal usability, and dispute resolution speed. Fast collections shouldn't come at the cost of administrative burden on clients.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Client feedback summary + portal UX change log

universal_controls.title: Early Payment Discount Calibration
universal_controls.description: Evaluate if 2% discount if paid within 10 days and a due date of 30 days or 1/15 net 45 discounts are still necessary. If cash is already strong, phase out or reduce discounts to improve gross margin.

universal_controls.title: AR Team Reallocation to Revenue Support
universal_controls.description: Shift unpaid sales staff capacity from collections to pre-billing verification, contract compliance checks, or customer onboarding to accelerate future revenue recognition.
universal_controls.audit_trail: Staff role change memo + revenue cycle time report

controls.title: Supply Chain Financing Leverage
controls.description: Use strong unpaid sales velocity to negotiate extended payables terms with suppliers or enroll in supplier financing programs without penalty.
controls.audit_trail: Supplier term agreements + financing program enrollment

controls.title: Dealer/Distributor Credit Expansion
controls.description: Offer higher credit lines to high-performing channel partners to drive volume, monitored by automated DSO caps.
controls.audit_trail: Credit line approval log + channel sales report

controls.title: business-to-business (B2B)/Wholesale Division Launch
controls.description: Leverage efficient collection infrastructure to onboard commercial buyers or institutional accounts with structured invoicing.
controls.audit_trail: business-to-business (B2B) onboarding pack + commercial long-term unpaid sales invoices report

controls.title: Retainer/Subscription Conversion
controls.description: Convert project-based billing to monthly retainers. Use fast collection track record to justify upfront or auto-debit terms.
controls.audit_trail: Client conversion agreements + MRR tracking sheet

controls.title: Scope & Change Order Pre-Billing
controls.description: Require signed change orders + 50% upfront before out-of-scope work. Prevents future DSO creep as project volume grows.
controls.audit_trail: Change order log + upfront payment tracker

controls.title: Patient Financial Experience Review
controls.description: Ensure aggressive insurance/patient collection isn't triggering complaints or regulatory scrutiny. Implement hardship programs proactively.
controls.audit_trail: Patient complaint log + financial assistance policy

controls.title: Multi-Year Contract Incentives
controls.description: Offer 3-5% discount for annual prepayment or multi-year Software-as-a-Service (SaaS)/managed service contracts. Lock in cash visibility.
controls.audit_trail: Contract amendment log + prepayment receipt tracker

controls.title: Corporate Account & Catering Expansion
controls.description: Use efficient invoicing to pitch corporate catering or monthly dining programs with terms for a due date of 15 days.
controls.audit_trail: Corporate account agreements + catering unpaid sales log
